title: Millennium Falcon (fake)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Youmay|the fake ''Millennium Falcon'' used by Noghri|[[Millennium Falsehood|another fake ''Millennium Falcon'']] used by [[Wraith Squadron]], or yet another [[Sureshot|one]] used by the [[Wild Knights]]}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:FakeFalcon.jpg]] |name=''Millennium Falcon'' (fake) |designer= |manufacturer=[[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] |line=[[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] |model=[[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] |type=[[Light freighter/Legends|Light freighter]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] |retired= |battles=[[Mission to Bpfassh]] |affiliation=[[Noghri Death Commando]]s |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|That's not the ''Falcon''.''"
"''WHAT?!''"
"''It's a fake. These guys actually dug up a working YT-1300 somewhere.|Leia Organa Solo, Wedge Antilles and Han Solo|[[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]]}} A '''fake ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''''' was used by a [[Team Four (Noghri)|team]] of [[Noghri Death Commando]]s on [[Bpfassh]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] in an [[Mission to Bpfassh|attempt]] to capture [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her unborn twins for the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Joruus C'baoth]]. ==History== In their continuing efforts to kidnap her, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], had managed to find another working [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]], using it in an attempt to trick the Solos into coming aboard and into the hands of their would-be captors. The deception was realized when Organa Solo noticed that the ''Millennium Falcon'' was not using its underside swivel [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and that she could not sense the presence of [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] inside. In order to drive off the kidnappers, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] used his wife's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to disable the ship by cutting the coolant lines to its main reactor. This simultaneously sent up a highly visible column of gas as a distress signal and disabled the Noghri assassins on board as they breathed in the [[korfaise]] gas that was released. ==Appearances== *''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]] {{Co}} {{1stp}} *''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Millennium Falcon (väärä) }} [[Category:Starships of Thrawn's fleet]] [[Category:YT-1300 light freighters]]
